steps.title: Identify the starting balance
steps.content: The initial deposit is the account balance when the account was opened. Since $x$ is the number of months since the initial deposit, that starting moment is $x=0$.

steps.title: Read the intercept
steps.content: At $x=0$, read the point where the graph crosses the $y$-axis. That value is the estimated initial deposit, rounded to the nearest whole dollar. The answer is 15.
